summary: When using EXEC_NPU_CMD in python_bind_src, do not pass temporary optional/scalar/bool expressions like c10::optional<at::Tensor>(bias), false, or tensor.scalar_type() directly. The helper macro stores arguments as non-const lvalue references, so these temporaries break pybind compilation. Materialize them first as named local variables such as convBias, keepDim, and meanDtype, then pass those lvalues to EXEC_NPU_CMD.
